---
title: "Day 3"
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
    code-tools: true
    code-block-bg: true
    code-block-border-left: "#31BAE9"
---

# Day 3 - Analysing multi-sample scRNAseq data in Seurat

- Today we will cover:
  - Integrating single-cell datasets.
  - Differential Gene Expression analysis and marker selection.
  - Cell-type annotation
  -
